Reserve

Fine Southern Dining in Savannah

Southern Soul. Savannah Spirit.

Ryan's Restaurant brings refined Lowcountry cuisine to a warm, candlelit setting—where timeless hospitality, coastal ingredients, and classic Southern flavor meet on Congress Street.

Reserve a Table
2011 A Savannah institution
Lowcountry Inspired seasonal cuisine
Elegant Dining room ambiance

Tonight's Experience

A celebrated dinner destination for locals and travelers alike

From the first pour of wine to the final bite of dessert, every detail is designed to feel intimate, polished, and unmistakably Southern.

Expect impeccable service, deep coastal flavors, and an atmosphere that glows with old-world charm.

Tonight's Recommendation

Bourbon Peach Duck Breast with charred greens and spiced pecan glaze

Featured Dishes

Signature plates from the heart of the Lowcountry

Lowcountry Shrimp & Grits

$28

Jumbo shrimp over creamy stone-ground grits with smoked bacon, scallion butter, and a touch of coastal heat.

Pecan-Crusted Grouper

$36

Pan-seared grouper finished with toasted pecans, lemon beurre blanc, and seasonal vegetables sourced from Georgia growers.

Bourbon Peach Duck Breast

$39

Seared duck breast glazed with bourbon peach reduction, served with heirloom grits and roasted brassicas.

About Ryan's

A Savannah Institution since 2011

Rooted in Southern tradition and elevated by modern technique, Ryan's Restaurant has become a cherished gathering place for anniversaries, business dinners, and unforgettable nights out in the heart of Savannah.

Our Philosophy

Hospitality should feel as timeless as the city itself.

Learn More About Our Story →

Guest Impressions

What Savannah diners are saying

Hours & Location

Find us in the historic heart of Savannah

Address: 411 Congress Street, Savannah, GA 31401

Phone: (912) 555-0347

Mon-Thu: 5pm-10pm

Fri-Sat: 5pm-11pm

Sun: 11am-9pm (Brunch)

Plan Your Evening

Whether you're joining us for a celebratory dinner, a slow Sunday brunch, or a special night in the city, our team is ready to welcome you with polished service and signature Southern warmth.

Tonight's Table Awaits

Join us for a refined taste of Savannah

Experience an evening defined by heritage recipes, gracious service, and the unmistakable charm of the Lowcountry.
